'''Abregado-fus''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] from the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Anza/Legends|Anza]] in the [[Abregado system/Legends|Abregado system]], within<ref name="CCW" /> the [[Southern Core]] portion<ref name="Region" /> of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. It was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] orbited by nine [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="CCW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Abregado-fus was first mentioned in the [[2003]] sourcebook ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', published by [[Wizards of the Coast]].<ref name="CCW" />
